'''Denna''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] student at the [[University of Agamar]].

==Biography==
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], he was one of the members of [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Anki Pace]]'s team to journey to [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] in search of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] archives.

He and Vil were captured by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and placed in the [[Embrace of Pain]]. Fortunately, both he and Vil were rescued by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Ganner Rhysode]] shortly thereafter.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
